summary: Near-static graphic card. Text reads 'CBP SECURES THE GAMES' over a stock stadium image with a soccer ball and the CBP seal, set within colorful FIFA World Cup 2026 branding. There is no audio and no motion.
notable_text: CBP SECURES THE GAMES; FIFA WORLD CUP 2026; U.S. Customs and Border Protection; #WeAre26 #FIFAWorldCup #USHostsTheWorld
